---
title: "ESB-vaktin & Þingfréttir"
subtitle: "Databeers #15"
author:
  - name: Brynjólfur Gauti Guðrúnar Jónsson
date: 2026-05-27
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: theme.scss
    simplemenu:
      flat: false
      barhtml:
        header: "<div class='menubar mb-10'><ul class='menu'></ul></div>"
        footer: "<div class='footer footer-default' style='display: block;'> <a href='https://metill.is/databeers15' target='_blank'>metill.is/databeers15</a></div>"
html-math-method: plain
revealjs-plugins:
  - simplemenu
---

## {data-name="Intro" .no-heading}

::: {.landscape-grid}

::: {.landscape-project}

[ESB-vaktin]{.project-name}

[*EU referendum, fact-checked*]{.project-tagline}

:::

::: {.landscape-project}

[Þingfréttir]{.project-name}

[*Alþingi pundit, in English*]{.project-tagline}

:::

::: {.landscape-project}

[Metill.is]{.project-name}

[*Public-interest data platform*]{.project-tagline}

:::

::: {.landscape-project}

[Sirkabát]{.project-name}

[*Podcast with Georg Gylfason*]{.project-tagline}

:::

:::

## {data-name="Þingfréttir" .no-heading}

![](Figures/thingfrettir-landing.png){.site-frame fig-align="center" width="72%"}

## {.no-heading}

![](Figures/thingfrettir-article.png){.site-frame fig-align="center" width="58%"}

## {.no-heading}

::: columns
::: {.column width="70%"}
![](Figures/thingfrettir-charts.png){.site-frame fig-align="center" width="100%"}
:::
::: {.column width="30%"}

::: {.chart-callout .fragment}
[Icelandic review]{.label}

[Miðeind]{.name}
:::

:::
:::

## {data-name="ESB-vaktin" .no-heading}

![](Figures/esbvaktin-landing.png){.site-frame fig-align="center" width="72%"}

## {.no-heading}

::: {.headline-quote}
"What would possible Icelandic **membership** in the EU cost?"
:::

[Vísir · 31 March 2026]{.headline-source}

## {.no-heading}

::: {.worked-example}

::: {.we-step}

[Claim]{.label}

[*"Iceland has adopted 80% of EU regulation"*]{.content}

:::

[↓]{.we-arrow}

::: {.we-step}

[Evidence]{.label}

[EEA-LEGAL-001 · EEA-DATA-017 · EEA-LEGAL-006]{.content}

:::

[↓]{.we-arrow}

::: {.we-step .we-verdict}

[Verdict]{.label}

[Partially confirmed]{.content}

:::

:::

::: {.we-counts}
**503** articles · **2,673** claims · **516** sources
:::

## {.no-heading}

![](Figures/verdicts.svg){fig-align="center" width="78%"}

## {.no-heading .reframe-slide}

::: {.reframe}

An LLM is a tool.

::: {.fragment}
Verify the methods.
:::

::: {.fragment}
Fail loudly.
:::

:::

## {data-name="Closing" .no-heading}

::: {.thinkers}

::: {.thinker}

[Tim Harford]{.thinker-name}

[calm down first]{.tag}

:::

::: {.thinker}

[David Spiegelhalter]{.thinker-name}

[inform, not persuade]{.tag}

:::

::: {.thinker}

[Onora O'Neill]{.thinker-name}

[trustworthiness over trust]{.tag}

:::

:::

## {.no-heading}

::: {.three-tips}

::: {.fragment}
[*"Does this make me feel emotional?"*]{.tip}

[— Tim Harford]{.attribution}
:::

::: {.fragment}
[*"Is someone trying to inform me, or to persuade me?"*]{.tip}

[— David Spiegelhalter]{.attribution}
:::

::: {.fragment}
[*"Don't try to increase trust — demonstrate trustworthiness."*]{.tip}

[— Onora O'Neill]{.attribution}
:::

:::

## Thank you {.thank-you}

- [metill.is](https://metill.is)
- [esbvaktin.is](https://esbvaktin.is)
- [thingfrettir.is](https://thingfrettir.is)
- *Sirkabát* podcast (with Georg Gylfason)
